task_completion.description: Connect to the local MongoDB instance and access the socioboard database.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot shows a MongoDB client (e.g., mongosh, MongoDB Compass, or a script) successfully connected to port 27017 and using the 'socioboard' database.
Screenshot shows the 'userpublishposts' collection being selected, viewed, or targeted in a query within the database client.
Screenshot shows the 'drafts' collection being selected, viewed, or targeted in a query within the database client.

task_completion.description: Perform a bulk update in the 'userpublishposts' collection to replace the legacy domain with the new CDN domain.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot shows an update command (e.g., updateMany) or bulk operation targeting 'userpublishposts' that replaces 'http://media.acmesocial.legacy' with 'https://cdn.acme-corp.com' in the 'mediaUrl' field.

task_completion.description: Perform a bulk update in the 'drafts' collection to replace the legacy domain with the new CDN domain.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot shows an update command (e.g., updateMany) or bulk operation targeting 'drafts' that replaces 'http://media.acmesocial.legacy' with 'https://cdn.acme-corp.com' in the 'mediaUrl' field.

task_completion.description: Verify that zero documents remain with the legacy domain and file paths are preserved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot shows a query for the legacy domain returning 0 results, or displays the updated documents showing 'mediaUrl' fields starting with 'https://cdn.acme-corp.com' while retaining the original file paths.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with a genuine database client or executed a real script, rather than mocking the output in a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show an actual database interface (like MongoDB Compass) or a terminal running a real database shell (mongosh) or script execution.

integrity.description: The database update commands were actually executed and acknowledged by the server.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the database server's response to the update commands, such as 'acknowledged: true', 'modifiedCount', or a success message from the GUI.

integrity.description: The agent performed a bulk database update as requested, rather than manually editing individual documents one by one.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a programmatic bulk update query (like updateMany with a pipeline or regex) rather than the agent clicking and editing individual fields manually in a GUI.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Database: 'socioboard' on port 27017. Target Collections: 'userpublishposts' and 'drafts'. Legacy Domain to replace: 'http://media.acmesocial.legacy'. New Domain: 'https://cdn.acme-corp.com'. The update must target the 'mediaUrl' field and preserve the rest of the URL path.
